properties.variant: exact DM data variant, e.g. DM PC 3.4 English / I34E
properties.file: canonical file path or artifact path; filename alone is insufficient
properties.sha256: 64 hex chars; must match the locked original data row
properties.bytes: integer byte size; must match the locked original data row

properties.variant: exact DM data variant, e.g. DM PC 3.4 English / I34E
properties.file: canonical file path or artifact path; filename alone is insufficient
properties.sha256: 64 hex chars; must match the locked original data row
properties.bytes: integer byte size; must match the locked original data row

requiredScenes.candidate_select: after source-bound C127 portrait click/F0280 append, before any C160/C161/C162 panel command
requiredScenes.panel_visible: first stable frame with G0299 candidate mode forcing C040_GRAPHIC_PANEL_RESURRECT_REINCARNATE into C101
requiredScenes.cancel: stable frame after C162 cancel closes inventory, clears G0299, decrements party count, and redraws menus
requiredScenes.resurrect_confirm: stable frame after C160 clears candidate mode, keeps appended champion, unlinks possessions, and disables mirror sensor
requiredScenes.reincarnate_confirm: stable frame after C161 confirm plus reincarnation rename/stat/vital reset branch enters its original-compatible stop
requiredScenes.hud_status_after: top HUD/status stable frame after each terminal Hall action, labelled with terminalAction=cancel|resurrect_confirm|reincarnate_confirm

properties.semanticStop: one of the source-bound descriptions in requiredScenes

properties.width: 320 for fullframe, crop width for crops
properties.height: 200 for fullframe, crop height for crops

properties.stop: source-bound stop label/function, e.g. F0128->F0097/VIDRV for original
properties.route: semantic command route, not screenshot filename

comparisonOutputSchema.passRule: all required artifacts exist, hashes/dimensions/provenance validate, and region comparisons are recorded; zero deltas may be claimed only from this JSON plus matching provenance
